## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX Labs' AI-assisted content marketing and SEO services for Boomerang.ai's potential growth needs.](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-powered content creation, SEO, and growth strategies for B2B companies](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Their services include high-volume content production (50,000 words/month editorial, 7,200 pages/month programmatic)](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes long-term SEO investment, with ROI typically visible after 11-12 months](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Boomerang.ai team showed interest but expressed some concerns about evolving search behaviors and LLM impact](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs' Service Overview

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli (ex-CMO of successful startups)](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows with human editors for efficient, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Works with 30+ brands, including Reddit, Firework, and Attention.com](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Offers content strategy, AI-assisted writing, SEO, and execution/production services](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### AI-Powered Content Creation Process

  - [Uses multiple AI models for different tasks (e.g., keyword research, title generation, outline creation)](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Produces 10 articles/week per client (vs. 1-2 articles/week for traditional methods)](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Implements 200-250 steps of research per article](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Utilizes various AI models (GPT-4, Claude, etc.) based on task requirements and cost efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### SEO and Keyword Strategy

  - [Conducts extensive keyword research (e.g., 50,000 keywords for Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Clusters keywords into categories and prioritizes based on volume and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Integrates competitive research and user intent analysis](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Focuses on ranking for high-competition keywords to improve visibility in both traditional search and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)

### Content Performance and ROI

  - [Tracks content performance metrics (clicks, impressions, conversions)](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Maps published articles to lead generation and scoring](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Emphasizes long-term ROI, typically seeing significant results after 11-12 months](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Addresses concerns about evolving search behaviors and LLM impact on SEO](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)

### Additional Services

  - [Offers programmatic SEO (e.g., 7,200 pages/month for Hagen)](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Provides CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Assists with technical SEO improvements (e.g., website speed optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/gFAzFePxir8sFo-K3pnTQNy9QmuMuJSf?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX Labs to share case studies and performance data with Boomerang.ai team
  - Boomerang.ai to review materials and discuss internally
  - Potential follow-up meeting to be scheduled if Boomerang.ai decides to pursue partnership
